feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How we can exclude documents that should be excluded from eDocument process?
entry.content:
In e-waybill process we need to exclude some delivery notes from DRC edocument cockpit. There is a process that use the same delivery type but some documents need to include to  edocument cockpit and some documents should be excluded. How we can manage to exclude documents that should be excluded from edocument process?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SOAP using communication arrangement
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm doing some test with outbound SOAP services following SAP guide (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/ff6e400b4066430f85e0b16f561900f4.html) but I have found several problems.

1. Using URL

I used method cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_url. The service I used to test is:

 http://www.dneonline.com/calculator.asmx?wsdl

The main problem was an error related to SOAPActions.

After reviewing a very, very, old thread from @thomas_jung, I was able to solve it also in SAP Cloud.

Using method set_soap_action of destination (IF_SOAP_DESTINATION), we can add the SOAPAction and the issue is solved.

This way, we were able to run the service properly.

 

2. Using communication arrangement

In order to avoid hardcoding the url in ABAP, I tried following method to create the destination: cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement

When setting up the communication system, HTTPS/HTTP cannot be included. ok, no problem, let's go.

 

But when we create the communication arrangement, Service URL automatically turns to https, that does not exist.

 

It obviously fails.

3. Using HTTPS service

At this point, I decided to use another free soap service, HTTPS, in order to continue with my tests.

https://www.w3schools.com/xml/tempconvert.asmx

The connection check, fails. 

If the path is removed, for service url: https://www.w3schools.com:443, the connection check is ok. I read old questions about it, and it seems it could work even if the check fails, so I continued…

4. Back to SOAPACtions

Using cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement, the object we get is different from previous one (if_soap_destination vs if_proxy_destination) so, set_soap_action is not available. Not sure if it's an error, as per comments, the receiving parameter should be SOAP Destination object for both.

Without SOAPAction, we have same error than point 1:

SoapFaultCode:4 Server did not recognize the value of HTTP Header SOAPAction: .

 

At this point, I have two main problems

I don't know how to configure arrangement for HTTP (if possible)

I'm not able to add SOAPActions to SOAP destinations created via arrangements.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Maintaining type of business for suppliers
entry.content:
How do massively modify suppliers to get to the “Type of Business” field ? 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: External tax engine Mapping Tag
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We're facing a problem with external engine tax calculation, where the provider says that we need to send the following tags, but we didn't find where these values come from.

"amountCalcType": "gross",

"subjectToPayrollTaxRelief": true, 

"enableCprb": true,

"withLaborAssignment": true

Please, someone knows where we can set these parameters?

We are localized in Brazil.

Best Regards,

Fabio

entry.content:
Provide a CDS view which can provide the value of the field Credit Exposure.

entry.title: How to Include Tax and Discount Per Item in Purchase Order Output Form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working on customizing the output form for Purchase Orders, but I’ve encountered an issue: the standard form doesn’t display tax or discount fields at the line item level for each product. I need to include these details for each line item in the output, but I’m unsure of the best approach to implement this in SAP.

Any advice or insights are much appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to delete a service organization in public cloud 2408?
entry.content:
Hello,
How can I delete a service organization in professional services projects?

entry.title: Printouts of Accounting documents (Portugal)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Would you please clarify how it is possible to print out accounting document mentioned below?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6dbc01446ae14a28b7142bb2203abc10/e4b5e42ffb9942198987ee10dba05104.html

entry.title: Sync Employee Central Termination Date to S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We are currently replicating data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via an integration in SAP Integration Suite called "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Employee Data".

Is there a way we can replicate the termination date or Company Exit date from Employee Central to S/4 HANA Cloud and apply it to the Business User's validity?

That way whenever an employee is terminated from SuccessFactors, once the sync runs it will update the business user's validity on S/4 Hana Cloud and it will get deactivated.

entry.title: Can DM user reschedule orders or set processing time of orders downloaded from ERP?
entry.content:
Dear community members,

 

I hope you are doing well.

I got wondered in Manage Orders app while testing order downloads from HANA Cloud.

 

1. Is it impossible that DM users adjust 'scheduled start's and 'end's point without REO? It seems the boxes are not editable (there are pictures below...). 

 

2. Is it possible to modify Parameters for scheduling such as Setup Time; Processing Time; Teardown Time; etc. of each operation in DM, and how? To be precise, those time parameters unfortunately have been set all zero minute in HANA Cloud, so I will modify those in DM after order downloaded.

For your information, my team is using SAP DM TDD & Hana Cloud Partner Demo Customizing.

I appreciate your comment with opinion in advance.

 

Yours faithfully,

Wonpyo

#digital manufacturing #scheduling modification #processing time

entry.title: Deploy SAPUI5 app to S4HANA cloud system
entry.content:
Is it possible to deploy SAPUI5 app to s4hana cloud system.

I only found ways of deploy to Cloud Foundry and ABAP repository (on-premise) system.

If possible, could you please provide me step by step documentation.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Add BP Role UKM000 in Customer Migration Template
entry.content: How to add BP Role UKM000 while migrating Customer Master through template?

entry.title: SAP TRM: Separation of loan principal and interest payments
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
we are currently facing the following challenge in our public cloud system. 

Problem:
Currently, SAP TRM can only post to one account. When the account "Liabilities to Affiliated Companies" is used for payments, the interest income is also posted to this account instead of to "Receivables from Affiliated Companies." It is not possible to differentiate between payment liabilities (loans) and receivables (interest).

Current Workaround:
Manual rebooking of liabilities to receivables.

Desired Solution:

  1. Enable differentiation between loan principal and interest payments.
  2. Post the loan principal to the account "Liabilities to Affiliated Companies."
  3. Post interest payments to "Receivables from Affiliated Companies."

This would eliminate the need for manual rebooking.

Process description:
First, we create a loan using the transaction "Create IR Instrument (TM_51)" with the Product Type "55I-Interest Rate Instrument - INT" and the Transaction Type "100-Invest." The Flow Type "1100-Principal Increase" and Condition Type "1200-Nominal Interest" are selected under the Interest Structure. The Condition Type "1120-Final Repayment" is used under the Repayment Structure.

In the next step, we use the transaction "Fix, Pay and Post Flows - TBB1" to post the loan.

Questions:

Is there any way we can get the desired result, which is a separation between the loan principal posting and the interest payments, without additional manual postings? Can we trigger two separate postings from TBB1? Is there any customizing that would allow us to do this?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Tobias

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Einvoicing for India
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing Electronic Customer Invoices for India. Can someone please explain what is the exact difference between the Einvoice for Customers Legacy (SAP Cloud Integration or SAP Integration Suite ) and the new Einvoicing for customers (SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition). We need to understand if there is any difference besides the way to push to Tax authority/Government

Please find the Sap help portal links below;

Einvoice for Customers Legacy

Electronic Invoices (Legacy) | SAP Help Portal

Electronic Customer Invoice

Electronic Customer Invoices | SAP Help Portal

Thanks

entry.title: API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV returns no header pricing data
entry.content:
We are seeing no header pricing data coming back from this service and wonder if it is a bug that SAP should investigate or fix.

Even in the tryout feature, no billing documents return header pricing.

https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/tryout

Has anyone been able to retrieve header pricing conditions for billing documents with this service?

entry.title: How can I configure Communication arrangement setup for custom theme in CIM interface?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on CIM implementation from SAP S4 public cloud. We are currently stuck at custom theme in CIM interface as its client requirement. We have already setup custom theme in S4 hana public cloud but when we try to open CIM interface from public cloud, CIM interface does not open in custom theme or any default theme.

How to rectify this issue? Do we have to setup communication arrangement in CIM interface as well, if so We don't have that feature in CIM. Please suggest us how we should access CIM through public cloud without facing theme issue.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management   SAP Ariba solution integration for SAP Business Suite  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: RF Devices connection with SAP Public Cloud WM
entry.content:
Hello,

We are starting a greenfield implementation for a client for SAP Public Cloud. For Cloud WM, I need to integrate the RF Scanner with our Public Cloud system. Mostly only standard functionality will be used for RF process. Can you suggest the steps for connection. I know there is a GSI 3W0, but can anyone simplify the process about APIs and all to achieve a smooth process.

RISE with SAP SAP Community SAP Fiori SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Simulation cannot be created: Could not add BOM component to configuration session
entry.content:
Hello!

We are in S4 Public Cloud and I am trying to simulate variant configuration model. We are using Order BOM as process and here is how the config profile looks like:

Now I am trying to simulate by entering the following parameters:

And when I hit OK I get the following error message: "Could not add BOM component xxxxxx to configuration session".

Note that - there are two components in the BOM and the error is generated for one component. The other is working fine as I have tested that in the sales order variant config screen:

Any idea what may cause this issue? I have tried this in our starter system and it works fine - we are facing this error in the customizing system.

  Any input would be highly appreciated.

 

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS Development - Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are implementing SAP Public Cloud and have some requirements that has to be addressed by custom development. There are few questions in using CDS Views in SAP Public Cloud Only and use the view in SAC Live and Data Acquisition models?

1. Can I use Eclipse IDE for creating CDS views? SAP Note: 3016104 suggests it cannot be used?

2. Is it necessary to have COMPOSITE and CONSUMPTION views and associated annotations like @analytics.category: #CUBE and @analytics.query: TRUE - Any restrictions?

2. Once the CDS is created using Eclipse, what is the Binding Type to be used? InA-UI, OData V2 Web API?

3. Are there any step by step process?

Thank you,

Arthur.
